title: host-meta endpoint (/.well-known/host-meta)
description: Implement the XML host-meta endpoint. Some servers check this before WebFinger. Returns an XML document with a Link template pointing to the WebFinger endpoint. ~10 lines of static XML with the domain substituted in.
design: Static XML template, domain substituted at runtime. Content-Type: application/xrd+xml.
acceptance_criteria: GET /.well-known/host-meta returns XML with Content-Type application/xrd+xml; Link template correctly points to /.well-known/webfinger?resource={uri}
